name: br-multi-agent
description: Coordinate multiple Kimi agents for the Block Reality project via a local filesystem message bus.

tools.name: br_agent_send
tools.description: Send a message to a standby agent. Use this when dispatching a task or starting a discussion.

to.description: Recipient agent role, e.g. java-mod, ml-pipeline, cpp-gpu, architect, doc-sync

type.description: Message type: task, question, discuss, announce (default: task)

thread.description: Thread ID for grouping related messages

reply_to.description: Role that should receive replies (default: coordinator)

tools.name: br_agent_poll
tools.description: Poll unread messages for a given agent (usually coordinator). Returns up to N recent messages without deleting them.

tools.name: br_agent_watch
tools.description: Block until a new message arrives for the given agent, then return it. Useful for waiting for a reply.

tools.name: br_agent_status
tools.description: Show inbox/read message counts for an agent.

tools.name: br_agent_list
tools.description: List all agents that currently have mailboxes.

tools.name: br_agent_clear
tools.description: Clear all messages for an agent. Use sparingly, typically at the start of a new session.

tools.name: br_agent_start_daemon
tools.description: Start a standby agent daemon for a given role. The daemon will poll its mailbox and invoke Kimi CLI automatically.

role.description: Agent role to start, e.g. java-mod, ml-pipeline, cpp-gpu, architect, doc-sync

work_dir.description: Working directory for Kimi CLI (default: current directory)

skills_dir.description: Extra skills directory for Kimi CLI
